name: Signature Silk-Cotton Tee
description: Crafted from an ultra-premium blend of organic cotton and mulberry silk, this structured tee offers a subtle sheen and an incredibly soft handle. Designed with a clean-cut neckband and a relaxed, editorial silhouette.

reviews.name: Alessandro V.
reviews.comment: The drape on this t-shirt is unlike anything else. Truly luxury.

reviews.name: Sophia K.
reviews.comment: Incredibly soft, fits perfectly. Highly recommend.

name: Luminal Fluid Drape Tee
description: An avant-garde interpretation of the classic t-shirt, featuring an asymmetrical hem and a flowing fluid silhouette crafted from sustainable bamboo-viscose blend.

reviews.name: Liam H.
reviews.comment: Unique silhouette, looks amazing under a cropped jacket.

name: Sartorial Pima Cotton Tee
description: Engineered with double-mercerized Peruvian Pima cotton, this structured t-shirt maintains its sharp shape and deep color throughout wear. A absolute foundation piece.

name: Zenith Heavyweight Tee
description: An architectural, oversized fit t-shirt constructed from 320 GSM French terry cotton. Featuring dropped shoulders and clean, minimalist stitching.

reviews.name: Hiroshi T.
reviews.comment: Perfect boxy fit. The fabric weight is incredible.

name: Aether Merino Wool Tee
description: Crafted from superfine 17.5-micron Merino wool, this temperature-regulating tee is exceptionally breathable and features natural odor resistance. Finished with raw-edge detailing.
details: Raw edge detailing at cuffs and hem

name: Sartorial Pleated Trousers
description: High-rise pleated trousers tailored in Italy from a luxurious blend of virgin wool and cashmere. Designed with an elegant fluid drape, belt loops, and side adjusters.
details: Double pleated front with pressed creases

reviews.name: Marcus E.
reviews.comment: Exceptional tailoring. The wool blend feels like butter.

name: Aether Cropped Wool Pants
description: Modern slim-fit trousers cropped at the ankle, crafted from lightweight fresco wool. Perfect for smart-casual styling with sneakers or dress boots.
details: Discreet side pockets and zip fly

name: Luminal Technical Cargo Pants
description: Futuristic utility trousers cut from water-repellent Italian nylon-blend memory fabric. Features ergonomic pocket layouts and adjustable drawstring cuffs.
details: Laser-cut cargo pockets with magnetic closures
Adjustable ankle cuffs with bungee cord toggles

reviews.name: Kenji S.
reviews.comment: The fabric holds shape beautifully. Amazing hardware details.

name: Zenith Wide-Leg Linen Pants
description: Ultra-relaxed wide-leg pants crafted from heavy Irish linen. Designed with a comfortable elasticated drawstring waist and raw edge hem lines.
details: Elasticated waist with leather drawstring details

name: Sartorial Leisure Wool Trousers
description: Bridging tailoring and comfort, these trousers feature a smart pressed crease on the front with an elasticated waistband and internal drawstrings. Wool-silk knit fabric.
details: Slanted side pockets, back buttoned pockets

name: Aether Calfskin Court Sneaker
description: A masterclass in minimalism. Our signature low-top sneaker is handcrafted in Italy from full-grain calfskin leather, lined with butter-soft lambskin, and set on a durable Margom rubber sole.
details: Full lambskin leather lining and cushioned footbed
Original Margom Italian vulcanized rubber cupsole
Hand-painted gold foil branding on heel

reviews.name: Jean-Pierre D.
reviews.comment: Absolutely perfect. True minimal luxury. Takes a few days to break in, then like a glove.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.comment: Clean lines, goes with literally anything. The leather quality is outstanding.

name: Luminal Knit Trainer
description: Constructed from recycled ocean plastics, this lightweight running shoe blends tech-wear functionality with luxury style. Featuring a bio-based EVA cushioned midsole.
details: Custom carbon-fiber shank for structural support

name: Zenith Retro Suede Runner
description: Inspired by 70s athletic wear, this runner is crafted from fine English split-suede and Japanese nylon. Hand-assembled with vintage-toned rubber outsoles.
details: Premium English Calf Suede & Japanese Nylon

reviews.name: James B.
reviews.comment: So comfortable and retro. The suede is high quality.

name: Sartorial Chelsea Leather Boot
description: A refined Chelsea boot crafted from polished French calf leather, featuring custom elasticated side panels and stacked leather heels.
details: Elastic side panels, leather pull tabs
Stacked leather heel with rubber tap

name: Zenith Sculpted Sole Sneaker
description: An architectural silhouette featuring a multi-layered panel upper of mesh, calfskin, and nubuck, resting on a lightweight, oversized wave-sole unit.
details: Calfskin, nubuck, and breathable mesh paneling
Padded collar and tongue, reflective details

name: Aether Double-Breasted Cashmere Coat
description: The ultimate luxury statement. Structured double-breasted overcoat tailored from 100% Italian cashmere. Unlined construction with hand-rolled edges.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.comment: This is an heirloom item. The fabric weight is heavy yet soft.

name: Luminal Cropped Shell Bomber
description: A modern cropped bomber jacket constructed from dense wind-proof technical satin fabric, filled with premium ethical white goose down.
details: 90/10 RDS Goose Down filling, 800 fill power
Ribbed collar, cuffs, and hem in wool-elastane

name: Sartorial Nomad Suede Overshirt
description: Tailored from butter-soft French goat suede, this unlined overshirt functions beautifully as a light outer jacket or mid-layer. Detailed with horn buttons.

name: Zenith Structured Wool Blazer
description: An architectural structured blazer crafted from high-twist wool twill. Finished with sharp peak lapels and padded shoulders for a dramatic silhouette.

name: Aether Technical Trench Coat
description: A technical reimagination of the classic trench, constructed from laminated cotton-gabardine that is fully waterproof and windproof.
details: Adjustable storm flap and waist belt

name: Aether Calfskin Holdall Tote
description: A luxury travel essential, handcrafted from structured French calfskin leather. Featuring raw edge seams and a spacious, suede-lined interior.
details: Premium Italian brass hardware, matte black finish
Contrast suede interior with zip pocket

reviews.name: Elena P.
reviews.comment: Perfect travel bag. The calf leather is incredibly durable and thick.

name: Luminal Sculpted Acetate Sunglasses
description: Avant-garde sunglasses handmade from Japanese cured bio-acetate. Designed with flat black lenses and thick architectural temples.

name: Sartorial Fine-Weave Cashmere Scarf
description: An incredibly light and warm scarf woven in Scotland from 100% pure cashmere, featuring short eyelash fringe details.

name: Zenith Minimal Brass Belt
description: Cut from thick bridle leather, this belt features an elegant hand-cast solid brass buckle in a custom organic shape.

name: Aether Zip Leather Card Holder
description: A compact card and coin carrier handcrafted in France from cross-grain Saffiano leather, secured by a heavy Riri zipper.
details: 4 external card slots, zippered main compartment

name: Zenith Structured Cotton Hoodie
description: Constructed from dry-touch 450 GSM organic loopback cotton, this hoodie has a rigid structure, double-layered hood without drawstrings, and a slightly cropped hem.
details: Kangaroo front pocket, ribbed side panels

name: Sartorial Silk Camp Collar Shirt
description: A relaxed-fit shirt cut from sand-washed habotai silk. Featuring a fluid drape, open camp collar, and premium mother-of-pearl buttons.

name: Luminal Liquid Metal Jogger
description: Futuristic high-shine joggers cut from high-density nylon with a silver metallic coating. Features elasticated waist and cuffs with zipper detailing.
details: 90% Nylon, 10% Metal fibers with silver coating

name: Sartorial Unstructured Linen Blazer
description: Constructed with no canvas or shoulder padding, this lightweight unstructured blazer drape naturally, cut from structured premium Italian linen-silk weave.
details: Three-button rolling to two, notch lapels

name: Aether Cashmere Ribbed Beanie
description: Thick 4-ply knit beanie styled in an elegant ribbed texture, crafted from organic cashmere sourced from Mongolia.

name: Zenith Chunky Leather Derby
description: A bold take on the classic formal shoe, handcrafted from polished bookbinder leather on a high-clearance lugged rubber sole.

name: Aether Merino Turtleneck Sweater
description: Constructed from premium 14-gauge extrafine Merino wool, this thin, high-neck sweater offers high warmth with a clean, second-skin fit.

name: Sartorial Summer Wool Shorts
description: Cut from ultra-lightweight wool hopsack, these shorts combine tailored sophistication with leisurewear comfort.
details: Finished with a single pressed crease

name: Luminal Liquid Windbreaker
description: A light outer layer crafted from highly reflective glass-bead embedded fabric. Reflects a bright silver under light beams.
details: Highly reflective under camera flashes and spotlights

name: Zenith Japanese Raw Denim
description: Constructed from 15oz selvedge raw indigo denim woven in Okayama, Japan. Rigid, durable, and designed to wear in uniquely.
details: Red line selvedge detail inside out-seam
Raw unwashed state for personalized fading

name: Aether Cashmere-Lined Leather Gloves
description: Constructed from extremely soft Nappa sheepskin, featuring touch-screen compatible fingertips and 100% cashmere lining.
details: Touch-screen conductive leather at thumbs and forefingers

name: Luminal Transparent Mesh Runner
description: An architectural lifestyle sneaker designed with a transparent mono-mesh upper, exposing the internal foot support structure.

name: Sartorial Pinstripe Double-Breasted Jacket
description: A dramatic double-breasted jacket tailored with sharp peak lapels and a classic structured chalk-stripe pattern. Wool-linen weave.

name: Zenith Chunky Waffle Sweater
description: Knitted from heavy dry wool yarns, this crewneck sweater features an architectural waffle pattern and substantial weight.

name: Aether Wool Pleated Shorts
description: Formal pleated shorts cut just above the knee. Ideal for modern editorial tailoring combinations.

name: Luminal Chunky Sole Chelsea Boot
description: An exaggerated platform Chelsea boot in water-resistant box calf leather with an extra thick custom molded Vibram sole.
details: Elastic side panels, leather pull straps

name: Sartorial Chunky Rib Knit Scarf
description: Extremely soft, oversized rib knit scarf in pure virgin wool. Offers high insulation and an editorial layering look.

name: Zenith Raw Denim Trucker Jacket
description: A classic boxy-fit trucker jacket crafted from Okayama 15oz raw selvedge denim. Designed to develop high-contrast fades.

name: Aether Relaxed Silk Trousers
description: Fluid, wide-leg trousers tailored from premium sandwashed silk. Complete with an elasticated waistband and side slit pockets.
details: Comfortable elasticated waist with internal ties

name: Luminal Open-Knit Mesh Tee
description: An airy, semi-transparent open-knit tee designed for layering. Knitted from a cool linen-cotton blend.

name: Sartorial Nomad Cashmere Crewneck
description: A fine-knit crewneck sweater crafted in Scotland from exceptionally soft 2-ply cashmere. An elegant layering staple.

name: Zenith Architectural Leather Backpack
description: A structured minimalist backpack featuring sharp geometric angles, premium calf leather, and concealed magnetic flap closure.
details: Internal padded laptop compartment (fits up to 16 inches)
Concealed magnetic clasp and adjustable padded straps

name: Aether Aviator Shearling Jacket
description: An exquisite aviator jacket crafted from thick French merino shearling. Offering maximum warmth and a ruggedly luxurious drape.
details: Nappa finish leather outer, soft wool interior

name: Luminal Water-Repellent Nylon Cap
description: A clean five-panel cap crafted from ultra-lightweight water-repellent Italian nylon. Finished with an adjustable webbed toggle clasp.
details: Breathable lining and laser perforated sides
Adjustable bungee strap with speed lock

name: Sartorial Relaxed Linen Pants
description: Straight-cut relaxed trousers tailored from mid-weight Belgian linen-cotton blend. Finished with a clean drawcord waistband.

name: Zenith Waffle Cashmere Beanie
description: Knitted in a unique waffle structure using organic cashwool blend. Highly insulating and textured.
